text:
One of the rarest Connor McDavid rookie cards is up for auction on Alt.
Alt Auctions
December 4, 2025
One of the rarest Connor McDavid rookie cards is up for auction on Alt.
‍
In 1997, Skybox printed one of the most iconic parallels of all-time, Metal Universe Precious Metal Gems, which have become the most treasured '90s football and basketball cards.
‍
Little do people know, Metal Universe was first produced for the hockey card market in 1996. But the dynamic Precious Metal Gems parallel was not included with the set, costing several hockey legends their chance at a PMG.
However, starting in 2012, hockey fans finally had a chance to obtain these precious grails, with the Metal Universe brand returning as an insert in a handful of Fleer brands released by Upper Deck.
The hockey version did not follow the standard parallel structure of the football and basketball releases. Instead, it came in the form of a 30-card checklist with four versions: Red /150, Blue /50, Green /10, and Purple /5.
‍
Since the initial release, they have continued to produce these hockey cards, with stars such as McDavid receiving a rookie card PMG.
A Green version is live in Alt Auctions, ending Thursday, December 11th.

text:
Extended Bidding Updates - 10.21.25
Alt Auctions
October 21, 2025
Testing Updates to Alt Auctions Extended Bidding
After hearing feedback from our community, we’re
testing out removing
the 10-second timer phase of Extended Bidding
. While it was intended to keep auctions moving, it created inconsistencies and moments that didn’t meet our standards for reliability or user confidence.
‍
Our engineering team is fully focused on making Alt Auctions the most
consistent and stable experience
in the hobby. If you’re not fully aware of what Extended Bidding is, let’s get into it! Every Thursday at 9pm ET / 6pm PT, Alt Auctions enters
Extended Bidding; this is
the final stage of each weekly auction where competition heats up and bids come in fast.
‍
‍
💥 Bidding is open for everyone
Extended Bidding is open to all — no qualifying bids are required. Once the timer begins, anyone can join in and place a bid at any time.
⏰ How the timer works
When any card in the auction receives a bid, the
entire auction timer resets to 0
. The auction only ends once no new bids are placed across any items. This structure ensures fairness and gives every bidder a chance to respond in real time.
🕐 Why we're taking out the 10-second timer
While the 10-second phase was originally meant to keep auctions moving quickly, it has created inconsistent experiences and moments of confusion. Removing it simplifies the close, strengthens stability, and helps ensure a more reliable bidding flow for everyone participating. This is a testing phase for us and we're hoping to get it right for you!
🏦 Payment periods after auction close
Once the auction ends, buyers have a short window to finalize payment details:
Under $10K:
1 hour to update payment method
Over $10K:
5 days to update payment method
If checkout isn’t initiated within that period, the payment method on file will be charged automatically.
✂️ Half bidding on high-value cards
One hour into Extended Bidding,
half bids
are activated on all cards priced at $20,000 or more. These smaller increments make it easier for bidders to stay competitive on high-end items and are automatically reflected on the bid page.
🚨 The fastest Extended Bidding in the hobby
Every 30 minutes, the Extended Bidding timer
speeds up
, keeping the action moving while maintaining fairness and transparency. With this latest update, Alt continues to deliver one of the
shortest and most efficient Extended Bidding experiences
in the industry.
‍
‍
At Alt, we’re building a platform collectors can trust; one that’s fast, fair, and reliable from the first bid to the final close. Thank you for continuing to share your feedback and helping us shape the future of Alt Auctions.
‍

text:
Pay with Consignment
Alt Auctions
May 30, 2025
Buy Now, Pay with Future Consignments
In case you missed it, we introduced a new way to make buying on Alt even more flexible: now you can use a
cash advance from upcoming consignments
to help pay for auction wins.
Whether you’re looking to upgrade your collection or score a grail, this program lets you tap into the value of cards you plan to consign—before they even sell.
How It Works
Eligible customers can apply the cash advance from their future consignment directly toward the cost of a recent auction purchase. If the cash advance doesn't cover the full amount, you can pay the remaining balance through our standard process.
Who’s Eligible?
To participate, your consignment must meet these criteria:
Cards must be
graded or factory sealed
Accepted grading companies include:
PSA
BGS
SGC
CGC
Single-card consignments
must be valued at
$250 or more
If your consignment
only covers part of the purchase
, the remaining balance must be paid within the standard 14-day auction window
Step-by-Step
Reach Out to our Alt Experts
Contact the Alt Expert team within
5 days of your auction ending
to initiate the process through email (support@alt.xyz) or the chat icon in the Alt app.
‍
Get a Quote
The Sales team will evaluate your cards and send you a batch quote, just like a normal consignment.
‍
Approve & Send
Once you approve the offer, you’ll receive a cash advance amount. Ship your consigned cards to the Alt Vault
within 14 days
.
‍
Settle the Remaining Balance
If your advance doesn’t cover the full purchase, CX will add a charge to your account for the difference. You’ll need to pay that off before we can complete the transaction.
‍
Receive Your Cards
Once your cards are in and your balance is paid, we’ll transfer your auction winnings to your Alt account.
⚠️
Important:
If all steps aren’t completed within 14 days of the auction ending, the purchased cards will be re-listed.
Example
You win a card for
$20,000
. You consign a group of graded cards and are offered a
$10,000 cash advance
.
Alt Experts create a $10,000 charge for the remaining balance.
Once your consigned cards are received and the $10,000 charge is paid, your new purchase is released.
FAQ
Q: Will Alt pay for the auction item in full before the consigned cards are sold?
A: No. The item is not paid out to the seller until the full balance is received—both the cash advance and the remaining charge.
Q: What if the buyer fails to send the consignment or pay the balance?
A: While rare, if a customer defaults after partial payment, we may charge a 5% non-payment fee to reduce risk. The auction item will be re-listed, and the seller of the original item will be paid after it resells.
Need Help?
Have questions or want to get started? Reach out to the Alt Expert team—our team is ready to help you maximize your flexibility and make every purchase count.
‍
title: Alt AuctionsMay 30, 2025Pay with Consignment

text:
Seller Stories | Caitlin Clark Gold Vinyl 1/1
Alt Auctions
May 27, 2025
A Gold Vinyl Pull, A Hawkeye Dream: Inside the Sale of the Caitlin Clark 1/1
‍
Some cards hit different. For Derrick Tracy, known in the hobby as
Daddo Stacks
, one pull in particular became more than a chase. It became a memory sealed in gold vinyl.
‍
Today, Derrick is auctioning off one of the most coveted cards in the hobby: the 2024 Panini Prizm WNBA Caitlin Clark Gold Vinyl 1/1 rookie, graded PSA 9. And behind that listing is a father-son story that runs deep - from Iowa roots to those thrilling rips.
‍
“That one was the card of all cards.”
‍
‍
Derrick, a lifelong Iowa Hawkeye born at the University of Iowa Hospital, is no stranger to basketball, or collecting. As a kid, he held onto his 1994 Upper Deck World Cup cards. Years later, the post-COVID hobby boom pulled him back in, this time with his son, Stavi.
‍
What started with ripping packs turned into full-on prospecting. Soccer, baseball, and of course, PC-ing their beloved Hawkeyes. The duo created “Stavi Stacks,” went on card show adventures, and traveled all the way to the Dublin Card Show for Stavi’s 15th birthday; a tradition they now keep yearly.
‍
But nothing could’ve prepared them for the moment they hit
the
card.
‍
The Hit
It was a Sunday night. Derrick had a work trip the next morning, his wife was out to dinner, and he and Stavi decided to rip a box from Blowout Cards. The chase was clear: Caitlin Clark.
‍
“We saw the shimmer, and Stavi knew right away; it was the Gold Vinyl,” Derrick said. “We sweated it, opened the rest of the box, and came back to it.”
‍
As Stavi revealed the red, then the “C,” they both froze. It was the 1/1.
‍
“I stopped recording. We carefully set the card down, and then we jumped around the room, hugged each other. Even my daughters came running downstairs.”
‍
The Meaning Behind the Card
For Derrick, it was more than just a pull.
‍
“I wanted to play for Iowa,” he said. “I played Division II ball at Chaminade in Hawaii and a year in Spain, but I was a Hawkeye through and through. My mom was a baller too—she played in 1974 on the first girls basketball team at Dubuque Senior.”
‍
The Clark card represented generational pride, love of the game, and a connection to women's sports that runs deep in the family.
‍
“This was our PC of all PC cards,” Derrick admitted. “But it’s just worth too much. With four kids, there’s a lot we can do with this.”
‍
Choosing Alt
Derrick got to know Alt after selling a Jared McCain 1/1 Prism through the platform. The experience; fast cash advance, seamless marketing, and full transparency, made it an easy choice when deciding to list the Caitlin Clark Gold Vinyl.
‍
“I was already working with the team and knew they’d do this card justice. They’ve been amazing throughout the whole process.”
‍
Family, Fun, and the Future
‍
Derrick’s favorite part? Watching his wife finally understand the world of cardboard.

What’s New?
Alt Rewards is built to give you full transparency into what you’ll earn with each sale. Your status updates each quarter based on how much you sell, and the more you sell, the more you make. It’s that simple.
‍
‍
How It Works
Your
quarterly transaction total
—from Alt Auctions and Fixed Price sales—determines your Alt Rewards status. At the start of each new quarter, your total resets, and you have the chance to level up again.
‍
There are
four tiers
:
Base
: Under $25,000
Silver
: $25,000 – $100,000
Gold
: $100,000 – $300,000
Black
: Over $300,000
Your status determines your bonus payouts, seller fees, and access to exclusive benefits like unlimited shipping, premium support, and special events.
Your status is valid for the remainder of a quarter, plus the following one; however, your quarterly transaction total resets to $0 at the start of every quarter.
Track your progress each quarter under My Alt in the Alt app.
‍
📈 Rates & Benefits
Here’s what you unlock at each tier:
‍
Alt Auction Payout Rates
(based on total submission value)
Earn up to
115%
of the sale price depending on your tier and submission value at the time of submission.
What does submission value mean? Review our glossary below for all the details!
‍
Fixed Price Seller Fees
(based on final card sale price)
Enjoy lower seller fees the more you sell. Black tier sellers pay as little as
4%
.
‍
Additional Benefits
Unlock exclusive features on Alt
Premium Support: As a Silver, Gold, or Black status Alt customer, you receive priority handling with a 30-minute response SLA during business hours. While all customers have access to support during the hours listed below, premium status members move to the front of the line for faster assistance.
Unlimited Shipping with No Fees: Alt waives all outtake fees for Black status customers—regardless of storage duration or card value.
Special Events: As a Black status member, you’re invited exclusive Alt events to connect with other people in the hobby.
See the Alt Rewards Glossary below for questions about this rate sheet.
‍
📲 How Alt Rewards Works with Snap to Sell
Alt’s new
Snap to Sell
feature works hand-in-hand with Alt Rewards. You can:
Snap a photo
of your cards (the more you submit, the better your rates)
Get a cash advance estimate
in 1 business day
Review your estimate and rewards status
Ship and get paid automatically
Get paid again
once the card sells at auction
Every sale through Snap to Sell counts toward your Alt Rewards status, so you’re always earning and climbing.

text:
Caitlin Clark Gold Vinyl 1/1 live now in Alt Auctions
Alt Auctions
May 9, 2025
The Modern Mantle? Caitlin Clark’s Gold Vinyl 1/1 Rookie is live now on Alt Auctions
It’s not often a player or card comes along that feels
era-defining
. But the 2024 Panini Prizm WNBA #145 Caitlin Clark Gold Vinyl 1/1—graded PSA 9—isn’t just another chase. It’s an icon.
This is the most notable Caitlin Clark rookie card to hit the open market, and arguably the second most important in existence (the only rival being the true 1/1) and now, it's live on Alt Auctions through May 29.
‍
The Pull of a Lifetime
Behind the card is a story straight out of hobby lore: a father and son, chasing Caitlin Clark pulls. The father—a lifelong Iowa Hawkeyes fan, former college and semi-pro player—finally landed the holy grail of WNBA collecting. One of the most important Clark rookie cards pulled by someone who’s followed her journey from the start. That's the stuff of hobby dreams.
A Record-Breaker in Every Sense
Caitlin Clark is rewriting the playbook for women’s sports cards. She’s already toppled Serena Williams' previous record card sales and keeps pushing the bar higher.
The ripple effects are massive. For the first time in hobby history, WNBA cards are outselling NBA cards. A 2024 NBA Prizm Hobby Box currently sits at around $400. Meanwhile, the 2024 WNBA Prizm? It’s pushing $900. This isn’t just hype, it’s market-shifting momentum.
‍
‍
More Than a Card. It’s a Moment.
This Gold Vinyl 1/1 isn’t just a one-of-one. It’s
the
one. The kind of card that collectors will look back on as the defining rookie of a generation. Could this be the next ’52 Mantle? ’86 Fleer Jordan? Now, the ’24 Clark.
If Caitlin keeps her current pace, her next record-breaking sale could surpass the
combined
rookie highs of Shaq, Tim Duncan, and Jerry West. Yes, combined.
‍
Live now, but not for long.
The Caitlin Clark Gold Vinyl 1/1 rookie is
live now in Alt Auctions
, running exclusively for three weeks and closing on
May 29
. Once purchased, this card may never see an auction again, so watch it while it's live or get in the bidding race to make it yours.
‍
‍
